notes: Post-Entry export-side coverage is intentionally separate from destination import duty rates. Export review focuses on filing value, export declaration correction, license/control basis, and rebate eligibility where applicable. Exact export tax or rebate rates must not be implied unless a maintained source exists.

rules.source_name: China export VAT rebate rate library
rules.source_note: China export VAT rebate eligibility and rate must be checked by exact 10-digit HS/CN code and filing date in the official rebate rate library.
rules.calculation_note: Post-Entry calculates the export rebate base only. It does not calculate final rebate amount until exact rebate rate coverage is connected.

rules.source_note: US export-side post-entry review is primarily AES/EEI, Schedule B/HTS, ECCN/license, value, destination, and end-user correction review.
rules.calculation_note: No maintained US export duty/rebate rate table is applied. The result should not be read as an export tax calculation.

rules.source_note: EU export-side review focuses on export declaration data, dual-use controls, origin/value evidence, and member-state filing correction requirements.
rules.calculation_note: No maintained EU export duty/rebate rate table is applied.

rules.source_note: Germany export-side review follows EU customs/export-control framing plus local declaration and evidence requirements.
rules.calculation_note: No maintained Germany export duty/rebate rate table is applied.

rules.source_note: Netherlands export-side review focuses on EU export declaration, transit/logistics records, export-control scope, and value evidence.
rules.calculation_note: No maintained Netherlands export duty/rebate rate table is applied.

rules.source_name: Singapore export permit / strategic goods review
rules.source_note: Singapore export-side review focuses on export permits, strategic goods controls, re-export responsibility, and value evidence.
rules.calculation_note: No maintained Singapore export duty/rebate rate table is applied.

rules.source_note: Mexico export-side review focuses on customs declaration data, origin/value evidence, and IMMEX or trade-program consistency where relevant.
rules.calculation_note: No maintained Mexico export duty/rebate rate table is applied.

rules.source_note: Vietnam export-side review focuses on customs declaration value, HS classification, origin documents, and preferential-origin consistency.
rules.calculation_note: No maintained Vietnam export duty/rebate rate table is applied.

rules.source_note: Malaysia export-side review focuses on export declaration value, HS classification, permits, origin evidence, and SST/exemption support where relevant.
rules.calculation_note: No maintained Malaysia export duty/rebate rate table is applied.

rules.source_note: ASEAN is a regional route option. Use Vietnam or Malaysia for country-specific filing/rate checks when known.
rules.calculation_note: No regional export tax/rebate rate is applied.

rules.source_name: Russia export filing and sanctions review
rules.source_note: Russia export-side review must keep ordinary customs value math separate from sanctions, restricted-party, and dual-use control scope.
rules.calculation_note: No maintained Russia export duty/rebate rate table is applied.

rules.source_note: Taiwan export-side review focuses on export declaration, technology/export-control scope, HS classification, and value support.
rules.calculation_note: No maintained Taiwan export duty/rebate rate table is applied.

rules.source_note: Japan export-side review focuses on export declaration, strategic goods/export-control scope, classification, value, and correction evidence.
rules.calculation_note: No maintained Japan export duty/rebate rate table is applied.

rules.source_note: Korea export-side review focuses on customs declaration, strategic goods/export-control scope, HS classification, value, and correction evidence.
rules.calculation_note: No maintained Korea export duty/rebate rate table is applied.

rules.source_note: India export-side review focuses on shipping bill data, HS classification, SCOMET/export-control scope, value support, origin evidence, and DGFT/customs filing correction evidence.
rules.calculation_note: No maintained India export duty/rebate rate table is applied. Treat this as filing-value and export-control review only.
